# Rust-analyzer test

# Start acme-lsp server
acme-lsp -headless -server '\.rs$:rust-analyzer' -workspaces $WORK &

# Format file
env acmeaddr=$WORK/src/main.rs:'#0'
L -headless fmt
cmp src/main.rs after-format.txt

# Allow rust-analyzer to index
exec sleep 2

# Definition of "HelloGreeter" struct
env acmeaddr=$WORK/src/main.rs:'#223'
L -headless def -p
stdout 'src/main.rs:.*:struct HelloGreeter;'

# References to "HelloGreeter"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/src/main.rs:'#223'
L -headless refs
stdout 'src/main.rs:.*:struct HelloGreeter;'
stdout 'src/main.rs:.*:impl Greeter for HelloGreeter {'
stdout 'src/main.rs:.*:.*let g = HelloGreeter;'

# Type definition of "g"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/src/main.rs:'#237'
L -headless type -p
stdout 'src/main.rs:.*:struct HelloGreeter;'

# Signature of method call "hello"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/src/main.rs:'#244'
L -headless sig
stdout 'fn hello\(&self\)'

# Implementations of trait "Greeter"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/src/main.rs:'#9'
L -headless impls
stdout 'src/main.rs:.*:impl Greeter for HelloGreeter {'

# Completion in the middle of method call "hello"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/src/main.rs:'#241'
L -headless comp
stdout 'hello\(as Greeter\)	fn\(&self\)'

# Hover over the call to the "hello" method
env acmeaddr=$WORK/src/main.rs:'#241'
L -headless hov
stdout 'hello::HelloGreeter'
stdout 'fn hello\(&self\)'
stdout 'Hello prints a hello greeting'

# Print all symbols in the file
L -headless syms
stdout 'Greeter'
stdout 'hello fn\(&self\)'
stdout 'HelloGreeter'
stdout 'impl Greeter for HelloGreeter'
stdout 'main fn\(\)'
stdout '/src/main.rs:'

# Rename HelloGreeter to WorldGreeter
env acmeaddr=$WORK/src/main.rs:'#223'
L -headless rn WorldGreeter
cmp src/main.rs after-rename.txt


-- src/main.rs --
trait Greeter {
    fn hello(&self); }

struct HelloGreeter;

impl Greeter for HelloGreeter {
    /// Hello prints a hello greeting
    fn hello(&self) {
        println!("Hello, ä¸–ç•Ś"); } }

fn main() {
    let g = HelloGreeter;
    g.hello(); }
-- after-format.txt --
trait Greeter {
    fn hello(&self);
}

struct HelloGreeter;

impl Greeter for HelloGreeter {
    /// Hello prints a hello greeting
    fn hello(&self) {
        println!("Hello, ä¸–ç•Ś");
    }
}

fn main() {
    let g = HelloGreeter;
    g.hello();
}
-- after-rename.txt --
trait Greeter {
    fn hello(&self);
}

struct WorldGreeter;

impl Greeter for WorldGreeter {
    /// Hello prints a hello greeting
    fn hello(&self) {
        println!("Hello, ä¸–ç•Ś");
    }
}

fn main() {
    let g = WorldGreeter;
    g.hello();
}
-- Cargo.toml --
[package]
name = "hello"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
